decisions.decision: Used `public.plain-text` UTType to carry the card UUID string — avoids App Sandbox entitlement issues with custom UTTypes on macOS
decisions.author: backend-morty

decisions.decision: Source column tracked via `@State draggingSourceColumnId` in `KanbanBoardView` rather than a global; falls back to `board.findCard(id:)` if state is ever nil (e.g., drag started outside the view hierarchy)
decisions.author: backend-morty

decisions.decision: Same-column drops are silently ignored (no board mutation, no event published)
decisions.author: backend-morty
